title: Delayed refresh under 20 hours must not be used
summary: Ensure <meta http-equiv="refresh"> is not used for delayed refresh
notes: Applied the recommended fix to the element

code.title: Delayed refresh under 20 hours must not be used
code.summary: Ensure <meta http-equiv="refresh"> is not used for delayed refresh

html.after:
<!-- Fix applied to meta[http-equiv="refresh"] -->
<!-- Delayed refresh under 20 hours must not be used -->
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="360">

code.what_changed: Applied the recommended fix to the affected element.
code.why: Ensure <meta http-equiv="refresh"> is not used for delayed refresh

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Delayed refresh under 20 hours must not be used'. Ensure <meta http-equiv="refresh"> is not used for delayed refresh This addresses a critical barrier and improves conformance with WCAG 2.2.1.
highlights: Resolves a critical issue mapped to WCAG 2.2.1
